info.title: uml4net.Tools
info.description: A command line application that processes a UML file and generates various reports.

commands.name: excel-report
commands.description: Generates a tabular report of the UML model

options.name: --no-logo
options.description: Suppress the logo

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Sets the logging level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]

options.name: --input-model
options.description: The path to the UML XMI file [default: model.xmi]

options.name: --pathmaps
options.description: Add pathmap key-value pairs

options.name: --auto-open-report
options.description: Open the generated report with its default application

options.name: --use-strict-reading
options.description: When Strict Reading is set to true the reader will throw an exception if it encounters an unknown element or attribute. Otherwise, it will ignore the unknown element or attribute and log a warning.

options.name: --root-package-xmi-id
options.description: The unique identifier of the of the root package to report on

options.name: --root-package-name
options.description: The name of the of the root package to report on

options.name: --output-report
options.description: The path to the tabular report file. Supported extensions are '.xlsx', '.xlsm', '.xltx' and '.xltm' [default: tabular-report.xlsx]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --use-strict-reading
options.description: When Strict Reading is set to true the reader will throw an exception if it encounters an unknown element or attribute. Otherwise, it will ignore the unknown element or attribute and log a warning.

options.name: --root-package-xmi-id

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Inspects an UML model and generates a text report

options.description: Suppress the logo

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Sets the logging level (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]

options.name: --input-model
options.description: The path to the UML XMI file [default: model.xmi]

options.name: --pathmaps
options.description: Add pathmap key-value pairs

options.name: --auto-open-report
options.description: Open the generated report with its default application

options.name: --use-strict-reading
options.description: When Strict Reading is set to true the reader will throw an exception if it encounters an unknown element or attribute. Otherwise, it will ignore the unknown element or attribute and log a warning.

options.name: --root-package-xmi-id
options.description: The unique identifier of the of the root package to report on

options.name: --root-package-name
options.description: The name of the of the root package to report on

options.name: --output-report
options.description: The path to the text report file. Supported extensions is '.txt' [default: inspection-report.txt]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
